5:["$","div",null,{"className":"rounded-[28px] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(12,16,30,0.92),rgba(8,10,22,0.96))] shadow-[0_20px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.28)] backdrop-blur mt-10","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"p-6 sm:p-8","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6","children":[["$","$1","block-0",{"children":["$","h1","h1-2",{"className":"text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-4xl","children":"PrivateDAO V2 Security Hardening"}]}],["$","$1","block-1",{"children":["$","p","p-5",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"This document describes the additive hardening layer introduced after the security review of `programs/private-dao/src/lib.rs`."}]}],["$","$1","block-2",{"children":["$","p","p-7",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"The goal is not to break legacy accounts, PDAs, or instruction interfaces. Legacy flows remain readable and callable. New strict guarantees are exposed through companion accounts and V2 instructions."}]}],["$","$1","block-3",{"children":["$","h2","h2-11",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Compatibility Model"}]}],["$","$1","block-4",{"children":["$","ul","l-20",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-20-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Existing account layouts are not reordered."}],["$","li","l-20-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Existing PDA derivations are not changed."}],["$","li","l-20-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Existing instructions are not removed."}],["$","li","l-20-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Strict behavior is opt-in through companion policy accounts."}],["$","li","l-20-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Proposal behavior is snapshotted at the object level so future DAO policy changes do not silently reinterpret old proposals."}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-5",{"children":["$","h2","h2-23",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"New Companion Accounts"}]}],["$","$1","block-6",{"children":["$","ul","l-27",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-27-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`DaoSecurityPolicy`"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-7",{"children":["$","p","p-28",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Stores rollout mode, feature policies, cancel policy, proof attestors, settlement attestors, thresholds, TTLs, and emergency disable state. Initialization is idempotent only for the exact same configuration. Policy evolution uses `update_dao_security_policy_v2`, which rejects rollbacks to weaker enforcement."}]}],["$","$1","block-8",{"children":["$","ul","l-31",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-31-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`ProposalExecutionPolicySnapshot`"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-9",{"children":["$","p","p-32",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Stores the DAO policy mode and feature policies captured for a specific proposal at the time the strict path is selected. Once populated, the snapshot is immutable except for an idempotent repeat under the exact same policy."}]}],["$","$1","block-10",{"children":["$","ul","l-35",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-35-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`ProposalProofVerification`"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-11",{"children":["$","p","p-36",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Stores verified proof metadata with explicit `VerificationStatus`, canonical payload binding, domain separator, expiry, and verification kind."}]}],"$L7","$L8","$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19","$L1a","$L1b","$L1c","$L1d","$L1e","$L1f","$L20","$L21","$L22","$L23","$L24","$L25","$L26","$L27","$L28","$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a"]}]}]}]

f:["$","$1","block-20",{"children":["$","p","p-57",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Strict V2 objective: A proposal using the strict path cannot finalize unless `ProposalProofVerification` exists, has `status == Verified`, is fresh, binds to the exact proposal, and matches the canonical payload hash."}]}]
10:["$","$1","block-21",{"children":["$","p","p-59",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Canonical payload hash: The strict payload hash is not a free-form label. It is derived from the V2 domain tag, DAO, proposal, and object version in the current implementation. Any later instruction-bundle verifier must extend this canonical serialization, not replace it ad hoc. The required extension set for a treasury or payout payload is:"}]}]
11:["$","$1","block-22",{"children":["$","ul","l-73",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-73-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"target instruction family"}],["$","li","l-73-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"DAO"}],["$","li","l-73-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proposal"}],["$","li","l-73-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"object version"}],["$","li","l-73-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"treasury source"}],["$","li","l-73-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"account metas relevant to execution"}],["$","li","l-73-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"recipient"}],["$","li","l-73-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"mint or native-SOL marker"}],["$","li","l-73-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"amount"}],["$","li","l-73-9",{"className":"list-disc","children":"confidential payout plan when present"}],["$","li","l-73-10",{"className":"list-disc","children":"settlement or proof domain tag"}]]}]}]
12:["$","$1","block-23",{"children":["$","p","p-74",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Implementation:"}]}]
13:["$","$1","block-24",{"children":["$","ul","l-79",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-79-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`record_proof_verification_v2`"}],["$","li","l-79-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`finalize_zk_enforced_proposal_v2`"}],["$","li","l-79-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`ProposalProofVerification`"}],["$","li","l-79-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`ProposalExecutionPolicySnapshot`"}]]}]}]
14:["$","$1","block-25",{"children":["$","p","p-80",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Trust model: The current production-safe fallback is threshold attestation. The attestors and threshold are encoded on-chain in `DaoSecurityPolicy`, and enough attestors must sign the transaction. This is an explicit attested fallback, not a fake cryptographic verifier claim. A future cryptographic verifier CPI can be added as another `VerificationKind` without breaking legacy state."}]}]
15:["$","$1","block-26",{"children":["$","p","p-82",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Invariant: Strict V2 finalization fails if proof status is not verified, proof is stale, domain separator mismatches, or payload hash does not match the canonical proposal payload."}]}]
16:["$","$1","block-27",{"children":["$","p","p-84",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Overwrite resistance: Once a strict `ProposalProofVerification` PDA is populated, it cannot be rewritten with a different payload, proof hash, public-input hash, verification-key hash, kind, or domain separator. Repeating the exact same still-fresh record is idempotent; substituting a new payload requires a new proposal-bound PDA."}]}]
17:["$","$1","block-28",{"children":["$","h2","h2-88",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"REFHE and MagicBlock Settlement"}]}]
18:["$","$1","block-29",{"children":["$","p","p-91",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Root cause: Legacy settlement status was stored as proposal-bound metadata, but external settlement was not independently verified on-chain."}]}]
19:["$","$1","block-30",{"children":["$","p","p-93",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Strict V2 objective: Confidential payout execution must fail unless a verified, fresh, authorized, proposal-bound, payout-bound, single-use evidence account exists."}]}]
1a:["$","$1","block-31",{"children":["$","p","p-95",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Implementation:"}]}]
1b:["$","$1","block-32",{"children":["$","ul","l-100",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-100-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`record_settlement_evidence_v2`"}],["$","li","l-100-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`execute_confidential_payout_plan_v2`"}],["$","li","l-100-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`SettlementEvidence`"}],["$","li","l-100-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`SettlementConsumptionRecord`"}]]}]}]
1c:["$","$1","block-33",{"children":["$","p","p-101",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Invariant: Strict V2 payout execution fails if evidence is stale, not verified, mismatched to another DAO/proposal/payout plan, mismatched to canonical payout fields, or already consumed."}]}]
1d:["$","$1","block-34",{"children":["$","p","p-103",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Consumption semantics: Settlement consumption is enforced by a single-use PDA derived from `[\"settlement-consumption\", settlement_evidence]`. This intentionally avoids zero-value sentinel checks. If the consumption account already exists, the same evidence cannot be reused."}]}]
1e:["$","$1","block-35",{"children":["$","p","p-105",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Overwrite resistance: Once a strict `SettlementEvidence` PDA is populated, it cannot be rewritten with a different evidence kind, status, settlement id, evidence hash, or payout-field hash. If a settlement needs a new receipt, it must use a distinct settlement id and therefore a distinct evidence PDA."}]}]
1f:["$","$1","block-36",{"children":["$","h2","h2-109",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Cancellation"}]}]
20:["$","$1","block-37",{"children":["$","p","p-112",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Root cause: Legacy `cancel_proposal` could cancel a proposal while status remained `Voting`, including after meaningful participation."}]}]
21:["$","$1","block-38",{"children":["$","p","p-114",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Strict V2 objective: Ordinary cancellation must not be allowed after meaningful participation."}]}]
22:["$","$1","block-39",{"children":["$","p","p-116",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Implementation:"}]}]

24:["$","$1","block-41",{"children":["$","p","p-120",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Invariant: Strict V2 cancellation requires `status == Voting`, current time before `voting_end`, `commit_count == 0`, and `reveal_count == 0`."}]}]
25:["$","$1","block-42",{"children":["$","h2","h2-124",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Realms Voter Weight"}]}]

27:["$","$1","block-44",{"children":["$","p","p-129",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Strict V2 objective: New integrations can request and inspect an explicit voter weight scope."}]}]
28:["$","$1","block-45",{"children":["$","p","p-131",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Implementation:"}]}]

2a:["$","$1","block-47",{"children":["$","p","p-135",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Invariant: New integrations can distinguish token-weighted, quadratic, capital-leg, and community-leg semantics without changing the legacy Realms-compatible account layout."}]}]
2b:["$","$1","block-48",{"children":["$","h2","h2-139",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Rollout Plan"}]}]
2c:["$","$1","block-49",{"children":["$","ul","l-150",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-150-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Ship additive accounts and V2 instructions."}],["$","li","l-150-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Keep existing DAOs in legacy mode by default."}],["$","li","l-150-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Initialize `DaoSecurityPolicy` for DAOs that want strict rollout."}],["$","li","l-150-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Snapshot proposal policy with `snapshot_proposal_execution_policy` before using strict V2 finalization or settlement execution."}],["$","li","l-150-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Use threshold attestation until a dedicated verifier CPI is available."}],["$","li","l-150-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Add verifier-CPI support as a new `VerificationKind` in a later additive upgrade."}],["$","li","l-150-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Recommend strict mode after tests, external review, and operational attestor setup are complete."}]]}]}]
2d:["$","$1","block-50",{"children":["$","h2","h2-153",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Policy transition invariants"}]}]
2e:["$","$1","block-51",{"children":["$","ul","l-164",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-164-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`LegacyAllowed` means legacy instructions remain callable and historical objects are not reinterpreted."}],["$","li","l-164-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`CompatibilityRequired` means legacy state remains readable while new strict flows should snapshot object policy before using V2 finalization or V2 settlement execution."}],["$","li","l-164-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`StrictRequired` means newly selected V2 paths must provide companion proof or settlement accounts."}],["$","li","l-164-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`update_dao_security_policy_v2` is monotonic: it can move a DAO toward stronger enforcement, but it cannot roll policy mode, proof policy, settlement policy, or cancellation policy back to a weaker setting."}],["$","li","l-164-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"A future DAO-wide policy change does not silently change a proposal that already has a `ProposalExecutionPolicySnapshot`."}],["$","li","l-164-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"A proposal policy snapshot cannot be overwritten with a different policy after it is recorded."}],["$","li","l-164-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Legacy proposals can only become strict when the necessary companion accounts are explicitly provided and pass the V2 gates."}]]}]}]
2f:["$","$1","block-52",{"children":["$","h2","h2-167",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"State Transition Diagrams"}]}]
30:["$","$1","block-53",{"children":["$","p","p-170",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Proposal lifecycle:"}]}]
31:["$","$1","block-54",{"children":["$","pre","c-176",{"className":"overflow-x-auto rounded-3xl border border-white/8 bg-black/35 p-5 text-xs leading-7 text-cyan-100 sm:text-sm","children":["$","code",null,{"children":"stateDiagram-v2\n  [*] --> Voting\n  Voting --> Cancelled: legacy cancel / strict cancel before participation\n  Voting --> Passed: finalize after reveal end and quorum/pass\n  Voting --> Failed: finalize after reveal end and fail\n  Passed --> Vetoed: veto during timelock\n  Passed --> Executed: execute after timelock\n  Cancelled --> [*]\n  Failed --> [*]\n  Vetoed --> [*]\n  Executed --> [*]"}]}]}]
